CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Сложные строки для поиска', 'сложные');
SELECT haystack, needle, ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) FROM test_strings WHERE ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) > 0.5;
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'hello') FROM test_strings WHERE haystack LIKE '%hello%';
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'раз') AS match_score FROM test_strings WHERE match_score > 0.2;
SELECT 'Test with nulls', ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, NULL) FROM test_strings;
SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(LOWER(haystack), LOWER(needle)) AS case_insensitive_match FROM test_strings;
SELECT DISTINCT haystack FROM test_strings WHERE ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'ABC') > 0.3 ORDER BY haystack;
WITH (SELECT DISTINCT haystack FROM test_strings) AS unique_haystack SELECT ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'check') FROM unique_haystack;
SELECT haystack, COUNT(*) AS occurrences FROM test_strings GROUP BY haystack HAVING ngramSearchCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, 'needle') > 0.1;
